products.title: Java Moss Mat
products.body_html:
1 5x3 inch Java Moss Mat per order.

The Java Moss Mat is a convenient way to add lush greenery to any freshwater aquarium. Pre-attached to a mesh or mat, this plant quickly establishes itself, providing a natural-looking carpet, wall, or accent for driftwood and rocks. Its hardy nature and ability to thrive in a variety of conditions make it an excellent choice for aquarists of all experience levels.

products.title: Samolus Parviflorus 'Red'
products.body_html:
1 pot per order. 

Samolus parviflorus ‘Red’ is a unique and compact aquarium plant valued for its small, rounded leaves and soft red to bronze coloration. It remains low-growing and tidy, making it an excellent foreground to midground accent in planted aquariums. This plant adds subtle warmth and contrast to aquascapes without overpowering surrounding plants and works well in both low-tech and high-tech setups.

products.title: Hygrophila Corymbosa ‘Stricta’
products.body_html:
1 pot per order. 

Hygrophila Corymbosa ‘Stricta’ is a robust and adaptable stem plant known for its upright growth and broad, deep-green and reddish leaves. Often called Temple Plant, this variety is prized for its durability and rapid growth, making it an excellent background or midground plant for freshwater aquariums. It’s especially popular in low-tech and community tanks where reliability and easy care are key.

products.title: Rotala Nanjenshan
products.body_html:
5 stems per order.

Rotala Nanjenshan is a visually striking stem plant that adds vibrant color and a touch of elegance to any aquarium. Known for its bright green to reddish hues, this plant provides excellent color contrast, especially when grown under proper lighting conditions. It’s perfect for creating a natural, dynamic aquascape in the midground or background, and is suitable for both beginner and advanced aquarists.

products.title: Anubias Pinto Mini
products.body_html:
1 rhizome with 4-5 leaves per order.  I grew these myself from bare rhizomes.  All new leaves are nice and white!

Anubias Pinto Mini is a unique, rare variation of Anubias Nana Petite, featuring beautifully variegated leaves with striking white and green coloration. This slow-growing, hardy plant is perfect for nano tanks, aquascaping, and adding a touch of contrast to any planted aquarium. Like other Anubias varieties, it thrives when attached to rocks or driftwood, making it an easy-to-care-for addition to any aquascape.

products.title: Blyxa Japonica
products.body_html:
1 plant per order.

Blyxa Japonica is a stunning, grass-like aquatic plant prized for its vibrant green hues and dense, bushy growth. This plant sways beautifully with the water’s movement, adding a dynamic and natural touch to aquascapes. Often used in high-tech planted tanks, it serves as an excellent midground or foreground accent, creating a lush, meadow-like effect. With proper care, it can develop subtle reddish tones, making it a favorite among aquascapers.

products.title: Cryptocoryne Petchii
products.body_html:
1 pot per order.

Cryptocoryne Petchii is a medium sized, hardy Crypt species prized for its compact attractive reddish-brown hues. Native to Sri Lanka, this slow-growing plant forms neat rosettes that make it ideal for midground and background placement. It’s perfect for aquarists who want an easy, low-maintenance plant that adds subtle color and texture to their aquascape.

products.title: Anubias Lanceolata
products.body_html:
1 rhizome with 5+ leaves per order.

Anubias Lanceolata (Anubias barteri var. lanceolata) is a beautiful and hardy rhizome plant featuring long, slender, lance-shaped leaves that give aquariums a sleek and natural look. Its graceful, upright growth makes it ideal for midground or background placement, especially when attached to driftwood or rocks. Like other Anubias varieties, it’s slow-growing, durable, and thrives in low-tech setups, making it a favorite among both beginners and experienced aquascapers.

products.title: Mixed Botanical Pack
products.body_html:
My mixed botanical pack is a variety pack of the all seeds pods and other botanicals I offer!

Make the most natural display possible with this botanical pack, like they jumped right from the jungle floor into your tank!

These botanicals are commonly use as decoration and food for shrimp and some fish!

They enhance biofilm growth and release small amounts of tannins, they also provide antibacterial and antifungal properties in your water creating a more natural ecosystem for your tank's inhabitants!

To sink faster, bring them to a boil (2-3 minutes) then let soak for 1 day or so before using.

products.title: Coral Moss "Mini Pellia"
products.body_html:
1 golf ball size portion per order.

Coral Moss 'Mini Pellia' (Monosolenium tenerum) is a stunning and rare moss that is highly sought after for its delicate, finely textured leaves and compact growth habit. This miniature version of the Pellia moss creates a unique, almost coral-like structure in the aquarium, making it a beautiful addition to aquascapes. Mini Pellia is perfect for aquascapers looking for a fine-textured moss to cover substrate, rocks, or driftwood, creating a natural, vibrant effect in their tank.

products.title: Rotala Wallichii
products.body_html:
5 stems per order. Grown Submersed!

Rotala Wallichii is a sought-after aquarium plant known for its delicate, fine-textured leaves and striking coloration. This plant exhibits vibrant green hues with subtle shades of pink and red when grown under optimal conditions, making it an excellent choice for aquascaping enthusiasts looking to add dynamic color and elegance to their aquariums. Its moderate growth rate and compact form make it a popular choice for midground or background planting.

products.title: Taiwan Moss Mat
products.body_html:
1 5x3 inch Taiwan Moss Mat per order.

Taiwan Moss (Taxiphyllum alternans) is a popular aquarium moss loved for its dense, feather-like branching that creates a lush, natural look. Offered here as a pre-grown mat, it’s an easy way to add instant greenery and structure to your aquascape. Taiwan Moss is hardy, adaptable, and low-maintenance, making it suitable for beginners while still appealing to advanced aquascapers.

products.title: Flame Moss Mat
products.body_html:
1 5x3 inch Flame Moss Mat per order.

Flame Moss (Taxiphyllum sp. 'Flame') is a distinctive aquarium moss prized for its vertical, flame-like growth pattern. Unlike most mosses that spread outward, Flame Moss grows upward in twisting spirals that resemble flickering flames. Offered as a pre-grown mat, it’s ready to place directly in your aquarium, making it easy to add a lush, structured carpet or attachable feature without the hassle of tying it yourself.

The Yozakura Gold Medaka Ricefish is a dazzling variety that combines the elegance of traditional medaka with a brilliant golden base color accented by metallic and iridescent highlights. The name Yozakura (“night cherry blossom” in Japanese) reflects their shimmering glow, which stands out beautifully under both natural sunlight and aquarium lighting. Hardy and adaptable, this strain thrives in a wide range of conditions, making it an excellent choice for aquarists who want both beauty and resilience in their setups.

products.title: Hornwort
products.body_html:
5 stems per order.

Hornwort (Ceratophyllum demersum) is a versatile and fast-growing aquatic plant that can thrive both floating in the water column or planted in the substrate. With its feathery, bright green foliage, Hornwort adds texture and vibrant color to aquariums while also helping to maintain water quality. This plant is excellent at absorbing excess nutrients, reducing algae growth, and providing shelter for fish, shrimp, and fry. It’s an ideal choice for aquariums of all sizes, particularly for aquascaping beginners.

products.title: Schismatoglottis Prietoi
products.body_html:
1 pot per order. 

Schismatoglottis Prietoi is a rare, hardy low tech aquarium plant from the Philippines that closely resembles Anubias in ease of care and appearance. It features bright green leaves with a lush, bushy growth pattern, making it an excellent midground or accent plant.

products.title: Anubias Nana XL
products.body_html:
1 XL rhizome with 4-5 leaves per order. 

This is a large rhizome of the popular Anubias barteri var. nana, known for its broad, lush green leaves. This plant is perfect as a bold midground or background feature in freshwater aquariums, offering the same low-maintenance hardiness as standard more compact Anubias Nana, but on a bigger scale. Its resilience and size make it an excellent choice for aquascapers who want a statement plant without extra care requirements.

products.title: Mint Charlie
products.body_html:
5+ stems per order.

Mint Charlie (Clinopodium brownei), sometimes called Creeping Charlie, is a unique aquatic plant often used in aquariums and paludariums for its round, bright green leaves and fast-growing, creeping habit. While it’s not a true aquatic plant in the wild, it adapts well to submerged conditions in aquariums, making it a great choice for aquarists looking for something unusual. Its trailing growth pattern makes it excellent for midground or background placement, as well as for emersed growth in riparium setups.

products.title: Cryptocoryne JUNGLE Pack
products.body_html:

  • 1 Crypt Lutea

  • 1 Crypt Tropica
  • 1 Crypt Beckettii

  • 1 Crypt Wendtii 'Mi Oya'

Who doesn’t love a Crypt Jungle!? My Cryptocoryne JUNGLE Pack is the perfect choice for aquarists who want to enjoy the beauty and diversity of these classic aquarium plants. Each pack includes a mix of different Crypt species, offering a range of leaf shapes, sizes, and colors from lush greens to bronze and reds. Known for their hardiness and adaptability, Crypts thrive in low-tech aquariums and make excellent midground and foreground plants!

products.title: Banana Plant
products.body_html:
1 plant per order.

The Banana Plant is a distinctive and hardy aquatic plant, easily recognized by its thick, banana-shaped tubers at the base of its leaves. These tubers store nutrients, allowing the plant to thrive in a variety of aquarium conditions. It produces bright green, rounded leaves that can remain submerged or grow toward the surface, forming lily-like pads. This versatile plant makes an excellent addition to aquariums, adding both visual interest and natural beauty.

products.title: Riccia Fluitans
products.body_html:
1 golf ball sized portion per order.

Riccia Fluitans, commonly known as Floating Crystalwort, is a vibrant green, fast-growing aquatic plant that can be used in various ways in aquascaping. It naturally floats on the water’s surface, creating a beautiful, moss-like appearance, but can also be attached to rocks or driftwood to form lush underwater carpets. Popularized by renowned aquascaper Takashi Amano, Riccia Fluitans is a favorite among aquarists for its versatility and unique texture.

products.title: Cryptocoryne Costata
products.body_html:

Cryptocoryne costata is a graceful, low-maintenance aquarium plant known for its long, narrow, light-green and red leaves that add a soft, flowing texture to aquascapes. Native to Southeast Asia, this hardy species thrives in a variety of setups, making it an excellent choice for both beginners and experienced hobbyists.

Pogostemon Helferi, also known as "Downoi", is a unique and highly decorative foreground plant with compact, curly green leaves that create a stunning, dense, and structured appearance in aquariums. Originating from Thailand, this plant is a favorite among aquascapers due to its striking texture and adaptability.

Cryptocoryne Beckettii is a classic, low-maintenance plant ideal for beginners and experienced aquascapers alike. Known for its bronze to olive-green, lance-shaped leaves, it adds rich, earthy tones and texture to the midground of aquariums. Over time, it forms lush, bushy clumps that are perfect for natural-style aquascapes.

This stunning plant brings a pop of color to the midground or background of freshwater tanks and is perfect for aquarists looking to highlight a feature plant without excessive maintenance.

It grows from runners and can form loose, grassy thickets that provide cover for fish and shrimp.

products.title: Automatic Egg Catcher
products.body_html:
The Daku Aquatics Automatic Egg Catcher has arrived!

This egg catcher is 3D printed with high-quality aquarium safe PETG.

It is designed to work in 5, 10, and 20 long standard rimmed aquariums and connects directly to a marina/fluval hang on breeder box kit (not included)!  You will also need your own airline tubing and air pump.

This is a great wood to tie mosses or epiphyte plants to – like Ferns, Anubias, or Bucephalandra.

To sink faster, bring them to a boil (2-3 minutes) then let soak for 1 day or so before using.

products.title: Catappa Leaves
products.body_html:
10 Catappa Leaves per order.

*Also known as Indian Almond Leaf.

These leaves are commonly use as decoration and food for shrimp and some fish!

They enhance biofilm growth and release small amounts of tannins, they also provide antibacterial and antifungal properties in your water creating a more natural ecosystem for your tank’s inhabitants!

To sink faster, bring them to a boil (2-3 minutes) then let soak for 1 day or so before using.
